title: Spine Triple Entry
description: Canonical routing entry that binds an objectKind, tier, and repo to allowed phases, schemas, and invariant/metric constraint families.

spineId.description: Stable identifier for this spine triple entry (e.g., spine.moodContract.tier1.RotCave.v1).

version.description: Semantic version of this spine entry (e.g., 1.0.0).

objectKind.description: Logical contract family or object kind for this entry.

tier.description: Tier in the HorrorPlace constellation that this entry applies to.

repo.description: Canonical repository name where artifacts of this kind and tier must live (e.g., HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts).

phase.description: Authoring or orchestration phase in which this entry is valid.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this spine entry.

schemaRefs.description: List of canonical schema $id values that objects of this kind must conform to.

allowedFileExtensions.description: Allowed file extensions for artifacts governed by this spine entry.

targetPathPatterns.description: Canonical directory and filename patterns for artifacts (e.g., schemas/contract/*.json).

requiredInvariants.description: Names of invariants that must be present in artifacts bound to this entry.

optionalInvariants.description: Names of invariants that may be present but are not required.

requiredMetrics.description: Names of metrics that must be present for telemetry or policy envelopes bound to this entry.

optionalMetrics.description: Names of metrics that may be present but are not required.

constraintFamilies.description: Constraint family identifiers that must be applied when authoring or validating artifacts for this entry.

telemetryTags.description: Optional tags describing how telemetry from this objectKind/tier/repo should be routed.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about this spine entry, tier overrides, or routing quirks.
